senses.gloss: to grieve, to distress, to concern, to worry
elative degree of هَامّ (hāmm):; more important; most important

examples.text: تعتبر التعليم وسيلة أهم لتحسين مستقبل الأجيال القادمة.
examples.english: Education is considered the most important means to improve the future of the coming generations.

senses.gloss: elative degree of هَامّ (hāmm):; graver, more distressing; gravest, most distressing
